scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[1] Simple OPTIONAL MATCH on empty graph
scenarios.description: [1] Simple OPTIONAL MATCH on empty graph
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)
RETURN n

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[2] OPTIONAL MATCH with previously bound nodes
scenarios.description: [2] OPTIONAL MATCH with previously bound nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[:NOT_EXIST]->(x)
RETURN n, x

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[3] OPTIONAL MATCH and bound nodes
scenarios.description: [3] OPTIONAL MATCH and bound nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (b:C)
OPTIONAL MATCH (x)-->(b)
RETURN x

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[4] Optionally matching relationship with bound nodes in reverse direction
scenarios.description: [4] Optionally matching relationship with bound nodes in reverse direction
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a1)-[r]->()
WITH r, a1
  LIMIT 1
OPTIONAL MATCH (a1)<-[r]-(b2)
RETURN a1, r, b2

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[5] Optionally matching relationship with a relationship that is already bound
scenarios.description: [5] Optionally matching relationship with a relationship that is already bound
scenarios.query:
MATCH ()-[r]->()
WITH r
  LIMIT 1
OPTIONAL MATCH (a2)-[r]->(b2)
RETURN a2, r, b2

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[6] Optionally matching relationship with a relationship and node that are both already bound
scenarios.description: [6] Optionally matching relationship with a relationship and node that are both already bound
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a1)-[r]->()
WITH r, a1
  LIMIT 1
OPTIONAL MATCH (a1)-[r]->(b2)
RETURN a1, r, b2

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[7] MATCH with OPTIONAL MATCH in longer pattern
scenarios.description: [7] MATCH with OPTIONAL MATCH in longer pattern
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a {name: 'A'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->()-[:KNOWS]->(foo)
RETURN foo

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[8] Longer pattern with bound nodes without matches
scenarios.description: [8] Longer pattern with bound nodes without matches
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (c:C)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(b)-->(c)
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[9] Longer pattern with bound nodes
scenarios.description: [9] Longer pattern with bound nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:Single), (c:C)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(b)-->(c)
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[10] Optionally matching from null nodes should return null
scenarios.description: [10] Optionally matching from null nodes should return null
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)
WITH a
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(b)
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[11] Return two subgraphs with bound undirected relationship and optional relationship
scenarios.description: [11] Return two subgraphs with bound undirected relationship and optional relationship
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-[r {name: 'r1'}]-(b)
OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[r2]-(c)
WHERE r <> r2
RETURN a, b, c

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[12] Variable length optional relationships
scenarios.description: [12] Variable length optional relationships
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:Single)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[*]->(b)
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[13] Variable length optional relationships with bound nodes
scenarios.description: [13] Variable length optional relationships with bound nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:Single), (x:C)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[*]->(x)
RETURN x

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[14] Variable length optional relationships with length predicates
scenarios.description: [14] Variable length optional relationships with length predicates
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:Single)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[*3..]-(b)
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[15] Variable length patterns and nulls
scenarios.description: [15] Variable length patterns and nulls
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[:FOO]->(b:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH (b)<-[:BAR*]-(c:B)
RETURN a, b, c

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[16] Optionally matching named paths - null result
scenarios.description: [16] Optionally matching named paths - null result
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A)
OPTIONAL MATCH p = (a)-[:X]->(b)
RETURN p

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[17] Optionally matching named paths - existing result
scenarios.description: [17] Optionally matching named paths - existing result
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a {name: 'A'}), (x)
WHERE x.name IN ['B', 'C']
OPTIONAL MATCH p = (a)-->(x)
RETURN x, p

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[18] Named paths inside optional matches with node predicates
scenarios.description: [18] Named paths inside optional matches with node predicates
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (b:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH p = (a)-[:X]->(b)
RETURN p

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[19] Optionally matching named paths with single and variable length patterns
scenarios.description: [19] Optionally matching named paths with single and variable length patterns
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a {name: 'A'})
OPTIONAL MATCH p = (a)-->(b)-[*]->(c)
RETURN p

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[20] Variable length optional relationships with bound nodes, no matches
scenarios.description: [20] Variable length optional relationships with bound nodes, no matches
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (b:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH p = (a)-[*]->(b)
RETURN p

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[21] Handling optional matches between nulls
scenarios.description: [21] Handling optional matches between nulls
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:NotThere)
OPTIONAL MATCH (b:NotThere)
WITH a, b
OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[r:NOR_THIS]->(a)
RETURN a, b, r

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[22] MATCH after OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.description: [22] MATCH after OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:Single)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(b:NonExistent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(c:NonExistent)
WITH coalesce(b, c) AS x
MATCH (x)-->(d)
RETURN d

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[23] OPTIONAL MATCH with labels on the optional end node
scenarios.description: [23] OPTIONAL MATCH with labels on the optional end node
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:X)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(b:Y)
RETURN b

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[24] Optionally matching self-loops
scenarios.description: [24] Optionally matching self-loops
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[r]-(a)
RETURN r

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[25] Optionally matching self-loops without matches
scenarios.description: [25] Optionally matching self-loops without matches
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
WHERE NOT (a:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[r]->(a)
RETURN r

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[26] Handling correlated optional matches; first does not match implies second does not match
scenarios.description: [26] Handling correlated optional matches; first does not match implies second does not match
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A), (b:B)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(x)
OPTIONAL MATCH (x)-[r]->(b)
RETURN x, r

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[27] Handling optional matches between optionally matched entities
scenarios.description: [27] Handling optional matches between optionally matched entities
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:NotThere)
WITH a
MATCH (b:B)
WITH a, b
OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[r:NOR_THIS]->(a)
RETURN a, b, r

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[28] Handling optional matches with inline label predicate
scenarios.description: [28] Handling optional matches with inline label predicate
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n:Single)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r]-(m:NonExistent)
RETURN r

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[29] Satisfies the open world assumption, relationships between same nodes
scenarios.description: [29] Satisfies the open world assumption, relationships between same nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Player)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(team:Team)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[s:SUPPORTS]->(team)
RETURN count(*) AS matches, s IS NULL AS optMatch

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[30] Satisfies the open world assumption, single relationship
scenarios.description: [30] Satisfies the open world assumption, single relationship
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Player)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(team:Team)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[s:SUPPORTS]->(team)
RETURN count(*) AS matches, s IS NULL AS optMatch

scenarios.id: Match7 - Optional match-[31] Satisfies the open world assumption, relationships between different nodes
scenarios.description: [31] Satisfies the open world assumption, relationships between different nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Player)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(team:Team)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[s:SUPPORTS]->(team)
RETURN count(*) AS matches, s IS NULL AS optMatch
